mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_PAYABLE (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_PURCHASE_ID, S_SUPPLIER_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, I_PAID_AMOUNT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sPurchaseId}, #{sSupplierId}, #{iTotalAmount}, #{iPaidAmount}, #{iStatus}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_PURCHASE_ID, S_SUPPLIER_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, I_PAID_AMOUNT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_PAYABLE WHERE S_PURCHASE_ID = #{purchaseId}

SELECT S_ID, S_PURCHASE_ID, S_SUPPLIER_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, I_PAID_AMOUNT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_PAYABLE
ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT p.S_SUPPLIER_ID AS sSupplierId, s.S_NAME AS sSupplierName, SUM(p.I_TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS iTotalAmount, SUM(p.I_PAID_AMOUNT) AS iPaidAmount, SUM(p.I_TOTAL_AMOUNT - p.I_PAID_AMOUNT) AS iUnpaidAmount FROM TAB_PAYABLE p LEFT JOIN TAB_SUPPLIER s ON s.S_ID = p.S_SUPPLIER_ID GROUP BY p.S_SUPPLIER_ID, s.S_NAME ORDER BY iUnpaidAmount DESC

SELECT S_ID, S_PURCHASE_ID, S_SUPPLIER_ID, I_TOTAL_AMOUNT, I_PAID_AMOUNT, I_STATUS, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_PAYABLE WHERE S_SUPPLIER_ID = #{supplierId} ORDER BY DT_CREATE_TIME DESC
